boss.name: The Ashen Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the ritual basin using the Eternal Ember.
boss.weakness: Requires the Eternal Ember pickup to remove protective necrotic shield.

encounters.trigger: Burning the barricade reveals a hidden staircase to the crypts.

pickup.effect: Allows interaction with sacred ritual objects
pickup.name: Eternal Ember

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Banshee drops the silver key needed for the sanctum door.
The death of the knight unlocks the gateway to the Monarch's throne room.

output.objective: Cleanse the cathedral by defeating the Ashen Monarch.
output.setting: An abandoned, mist-covered cathedral in a desolate wasteland.

boss.name: The Hollow Sovereign

Defeating the wraith causes the final gate to the throne room to unlock.
